name: MCP-UI Resource
description: MCP tool results carry an embedded ui:// resource whose declarative JSON payload is rendered by @kiln/schema's SchemaRenderer.
whenToUse: Reach for this when tools already live behind MCP and you want the tool itself to own the UI payload (via an embedded ui:// resource) rather than having the client re-derive UI from plain tool-call arguments.
previewPrompts: What's the latest build result on main?
Show me the build result for the flaky-branch.
Check the CI status for main.
